title: Private Detectives and Investigators
description: Gather, analyze, compile, and report information regarding individuals or organizations to clients, or detect occurrences of unlawful acts or infractions of rules in private establishment.

tasks.text: Write reports or case summaries to document investigations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct private investigations on a paid basis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Search computer databases, credit reports, public records, tax or legal filings, or other resources to locate persons or to compile information for investigations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Conduct personal background investigations, such as pre-employment checks, to obtain information about an individual's character, financial status, or personal history.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Expose fraudulent insurance claims or stolen funds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain and analyze information on suspects, crimes, or disturbances to solve cases, to identify criminal activity, or to gather information for court cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Testify at hearings or court trials to present evidence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Question persons to obtain evidence for cases of divorce, child custody, or missing persons or information about individuals' character or financial status.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and document activities of individuals to detect unlawful acts or to obtain evidence for cases, using binoculars and still or video cameras.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with establishment officials, security departments, police, or postal officials to identify problems, provide information, or receive instructions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate companies' financial standings, or locate funds stolen by embezzlers, using accounting skills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform undercover operations, such as evaluating the performance or honesty of employees by posing as customers or employees.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Alert appropriate personnel to suspects' locations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Count cash and review transactions, sales checks, or register tapes to verify amounts or to identify shortages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
